data.title: Judge Tosses SEC’s Case Against Richard Heart—But He Remains on the Run
data.description:
A U.S. district judge has dismissed the SEC’s lawsuit against Hex founder Richard Heart, citing lack of jurisdiction, but Heart still faces legal troubles in Finland.

The post Judge Tosses SEC’s Case Against Richard Heart—But He Remains on the Run first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/03/01/sec-drops-case-against-richard-heart/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=sec-drops-case-against-richard-heart

data.title: Legendary rapper Snoop Dogg announces he will no longer use Spotify and will switch to Web3 streaming platform
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Legendary rapper Snoop Dogg announced that he will no longer use Spotify (I don't f**k with Spotify anymore) and turn to Web3 streaming platform. It is reported that Snoop Dogg has reached a cooperation with Tune.fm to release the single "Spaceship Party", but a Tune.fm spokesperson refused to disclose more transaction details of the cooperation between the two parties. (Billboard)
Previously, the decentralized music streaming platform Tune.fm completed a $50 million financing in September last year, with LDA Capital, Alpha Token Capital, Block Alpha, Animoca Brands, The HBAR Foundation and GDA Capital participating in the investment.

data.title: Olumide Osunkoya Sentenced to 4 Years for £2.5M Illegal ATM Scheme
data.description:
Olumide Osunkoya was sentenced to four years in prison for running unregistered cryptocurrency ATMs in the UK, despite being denied FCA approval.
source: https://coincu.com/324827-olumide-osunkoya-sentenced-to-4-years

data.title: Bitcoin And Altcoins Rebound As US Inflation Cools—Is The Downtrend Over?
data.description:
US inflation data has injected renewed optimism into the Bitcoin and broader cryptocurrency markets. In January, the Personal Consumption Expenditures (PCE) inflation—the Federal Reserve’s preferred measure—fell to 2.5%, precisely in line with expectations. Core PCE inflation was reported at 2.6%, also matching forecasts, marking the first decline in PCE inflation since September 2024. Bitcoin...
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin-altcoins-rebound-us-inflation-cools/

data.title: White House and Donald Trump will host its first-ever Crypto Summit next Friday
data.description:
Fox Business reporter Eleanor Terrett announced on February 28 that President Trump will host and deliver remarks at the first ever White House Crypto Summit on Friday, March 7. The Summit will feature prominent founders, CEOs, and investors from the crypto ecosystem.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/white-house-crypto-summit-next/

data.title: India seizes $2.75 million in crypto in GainBitcoin scam
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News The Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) of India announced this week that it had seized cryptocurrencies worth 239.4 million Indian rupees (about $2.75 million) and other key evidence in a nationwide raid on the Gainbitcoin scam.
The agency conducted searches at more than 60 locations in India from February 25 to 26, 2025, targeting individuals and entities suspected of money laundering fraud. The main cities involved in the operation included Delhi, Pune, Nader, Kolhapur, Mumbai, Bangalore, Chandigarh, Mohali, Jhansi and Hubli. (News.bitcoin)

data.title: India's CBI Seizes Cryptocurrency in Nationwide Fraud Crackdown
data.description: According to PANews, the Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) in India has announced the seizure of cryptocurrency valued at 239.4 million Indian Rupees (approximately 2.75 million USD) in connection with the Gainbitcoin fraud case. This operation was part of a nationwide crackdown targeting individuals and entities suspected of money laundering. The searches were conducted from February 25 to 26, 2025, across more than 60 locations in India. Major cities involved in the operation included Delhi, Pune, Nadiad, Kolhapur, Mumbai, Bangalore, Chandigarh, Mohali, Jhansi, and Hubli.
